news.summary: Elevate your summer style with trendy press-on nails and pre-glued lashes inspired by the popular series. KISS Products, Inc. from PORT WASHINGTON, N.Y., made the exciting announcement on June 27, 2025. As a top provider of high-quality DIY beauty products, KISS is introducing a new, exclusive line of items that are sure to heat up your summer look.
news.headline: KISS Products partners with The Summer I Turned Pretty for new nail and lash collection. Launching on June 27, 2025.

news.summary: In Spartanburg, South Carolina on June 27, 2025, Mobile Communications America (MCA), a top provider of wireless communication solutions for improving workplace safety, security, and efficiency, was named the 2025 Partner of the Year by Semtech Corporation, a worldwide company.
news.headline: MCA named 2025 Partner of the Year by Semtech Corporation for wireless communication solutions.

news.summary: In Daytona Beach, Florida on June 27, 2025, Halifax Humane Society revealed a new collaboration with Petco Love to introduce an innovative program known as Petco Love Lost. This initiative offers a photo-matching pet reunification database fueled by AI technology, and will be particularly significant as the hurricane season intensifies. The system aims to assist in reuniting lost pets with their owners and is available at no cost.
news.headline: Halifax Humane Society partners with Petco Love Lost to reunite lost pets using AI in Volusia County ahead of hurricane season.

news.summary: In New York, Perfect Corp., a top beauty and fashion tech provider, has been honored at the Newsweek AI Impact Awards. The company won the “Brand & Retail: Best Outcomes, Customer Experience” category for its Real-Time Skin Analysis solution. This innovative technology has significantly improved customer engagement and personalized skincare. The prestigious award recognizes Perfect Corp.'s transformative impact in the industry. The Newsweek AI Impact Awards highlight groundbreaking advancements and Perfect Corp. stands out as a leader in the field.
news.headline: Perfect Corp. wins Newsweek AI Impact Award for Best Customer Experience in Brand & Retail Category for Real-Time Skin Analysis solution, enhancing customer engagement.

news.summary: In Miami, Starboard Group has appointed Anthony Richards as the new Vice President of Retail Experience & Sales Optimization.
news.headline: Starboard Group appoints Anthony Richards as VP of Retail Experience & Sales Optimization in Miami.

news.summary: Access the "Vault Break" bonus round in Crash Joker for a chance to win significant cash prizes. ACR Poker has officially released Crash Joker, a progressive jackpot game tailored to poker enthusiasts. The game was launched in San Jose, Costa Rica on June 27, 2025. Following a successful beta testing phase, players can now enjoy the game and compete for large cash rewards.
news.headline: ACR Poker launches Crash Joker, a progressive jackpot game for poker players. Features "Vault Break" bonus round for big cash prizes.

news.summary: A growing number of major U.S. companies are including Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) in their balance sheets, raising concerns over market risks amid the acceleration of this trend during President Donald Trump's administration. Companies like Trump Media & Technology Group (NASDAQ: DJT) are leading this movement, with plans to invest about $2.5 billion in Bitcoin through stock and debt sales. Trump's supportive stance on cryptocurrency has significantly influenced regulatory policies, with reports of his administration scaling back enforcement measures and advocating for crypto-friendly laws. As per Standard Chartered, over 60 publicly traded companies globally now collectively hold more than 673,000 Bitcoin, valued at around $75 billion by the end of May. Trump Media is among the entities...
news.headline: Corporate Bitcoin buying spree raises market risks as U.S. firms add BTC to balance sheets. Trump administration pushing pro-crypto policies. Companies holding over 673,000 Bitcoin worth $75 billion.

news.summary: A company based in Centennial, Colorado, NUBURU, Inc. (NYSE American: BURU), renowned for high-power blue laser technology, shared updates on its strategic shift. This includes advancements in its Defense & Security Hub and notable acquisitions. The company discloses that the regulatory approval procedure for acquiring Tekne SpA ("Tekne") is underway. This acquisition is being reviewed through Italy’s Golden Power mechanism and is advancing as anticipated. NUBURU, Inc. is making significant headway with this transformation, reflecting positive developments in its organizational direction, with specific attention to its Defense & Security operations and new acquisitions.
news.headline: NUBURU acquires Tekne SpA and progresses in Defense-Tech with €50M military deployment. NYSE: BURU reports positive regulatory process.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, a partnership has been formed between NIC Premium Finance and ePayPolicy to enhance accessibility to premium financing solutions for insurance firms. The collaboration, initiated on June 27, 2025, aims to streamline services for the industry. This move comes amidst a significant increase in e-commerce customers during the COVID-19 pandemic, highlighting the importance of adapting to changing market trends.
news.headline: NIC Premium Finance partners with ePayPolicy to facilitate premium financing for insurance companies, improving industry access.

news.summary: OsteoStrong, a renowned company specializing in skeletal strength conditioning, is introducing its science-backed technology to the Birmingham Metropolitan Area. The expansion will include a new facility in Hoover, Alabama, set to open on June 27, 2025. This initiative aims to provide residents with access to state-of-the-art methods for enhancing skeletal health and strength. OsteoStrong is a global leader in this field, and the new location will cater to the increasing demand for such services in the area. Residents of Hoover can now benefit from the advanced skeletal strengthening technology offered by OsteoStrong, promoting overall health and well-being.
news.headline: OsteoStrong opens new location in Hoover, Alabama, providing skeletal strength technology to Birmingham.

news.summary: In England on June 27, 2025, Leeds United FC, a well-known football club worldwide, partnered with Reflectiz, a top company offering proactive web security. They revealed plans for an upcoming webinar called "Beyond the Breach: How Leeds United Implemented Proactive Web Security After a Magecart incident."
news.headline: Leeds United FC partners with Reflectiz for webinar on proactive web security after cyber attack on June 27, 2025.

news.summary: MyStandard, a cutting-edge Web3 platform revolutionizing monetization for creators, recently announced an extraordinary opportunity for a unique experience - The MYST Main Event. This exclusive giveaway features renowned World Series of Poker Champion Jamie Gold. The event will take place in Las Vegas on June 27, 2025. It promises a once-in-a-lifetime journey for participants with exciting giveaways and interactions. This initiative underscores MyStandard's commitment to empowering creators and fostering innovation in the digital space.
news.headline: MyStandard launches $10,000 WSOP Main Event giveaway with Jamie Gold, transforming creator monetization.

news.summary: In an announcement made on June 27, 2025, in New Braunfels, Texas, GVTC introduced its latest advancement, Outdoor WiFi. This cutting-edge internet service offers high-speed connectivity throughout all areas of your property, including patios, poolside areas, workshops, and lakefront spots. This innovation aims to provide fast and reliable internet access in outdoor spaces, enhancing connectivity for users.
news.headline: GVTC in Texas introduces Outdoor WiFi service to provide fast, stable connectivity across properties.

news.summary: The Synergy Company, a prominent organic supplements manufacturer, was recently honored for its enduring dedication spanning decades towards purity, sustainability, and ethical business principles. The company received recognition for its values-driven practices in Moab, Utah, on June 27, 2025. This accolade highlights the company's commitment to upholding high standards in the industry.
news.headline: Synergy Company wins Nutrition Business Journal Management Achievement Award for commitment to purity and sustainability.

news.summary: In King of Prussia, Pennsylvania, on June 27th, 2025, Core Solutions (Core) revealed their partnership with OPEN MINDS, a renowned national market intelligence and services firm. Core Solutions, a prominent provider of AI-enhanced Electronic Health Record (EHR) solutions for the behavioral health sector, announced the inception of their AI Innovation Advisory in collaboration with OPEN MINDS. This strategic alliance aims to leverage Core Solutions' expertise in AI technology for EHR systems within behavioral health, highlighting their commitment to innovation and improvement in the industry.
news.headline: Core Solutions & OPEN MINDS form AI Advisory Board for behavioral health with ethical AI practices.

news.summary: In Lisbon, Portugal on June 27, 2025, Envision Energy, a prominent player in green technology, was recognized with the prestigious "Segment Champions" award by the Global Wind Energy Council (GWEC) during its 20th Anniversary Gala Dinner. This honor was bestowed upon Envision Energy for its remarkable contributions to the industry.
news.headline: Envision Energy awarded "Segment Champions" by GWEC in Lisbon, Portugal. Honored for innovation in global wind energy market.

news.summary: On July 4, 2025, James Composervist, a composer from New York, will unveil his contentious orchestral composition titled "Trump Portrait" on all major streaming services. This release coincides with the country's Independence Day festivities and is set to spark conversation due to its controversial nature.
news.headline: Composer James Composervist to release "Trump Portrait" on July 4, 2025, a controversial orchestral work available on all platforms.

news.summary: KB Home has revealed the grand opening of a new townhome development in Clermont, Florida. The townhome community is located in Orlando and marks a significant addition to the area. This expansion signals growth in the housing market, with a projected increase in residential units. The new development showcases KB Home's commitment to providing quality housing options and fostering relationships within the community. Residents and prospective buyers in Clermont can look forward to this exciting new opportunity to invest in real estate.
news.headline: KB Home opens new townhome community in Clermont, Florida. Located in Clermont, the development is equipped with modern amenities for convenient living.

news.summary: In New York, Blackstone Mortgage Trust, Inc. (NYSE: BXMT) revealed plans to release its Q2 2025 earnings presentation on www.bxmt.com and submit its Form 10-Q before market open on July 30, 2025. A conference call is scheduled for 9:00 a.m. ET the same day to discuss the results. Registration for the webcast can be done through the link: https://event.webcasts.com/starthere.jsp?ei=1725503&tp_key=1e71831ba3.
news.headline: Blackstone Mortgage Trust (NYSE: BXMT) to release Q2 2025 earnings on July 30, 2025, with a conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET. Webcast registration available.

news.headline: PCE inflation stable in May, but experts expect Trump's tariffs to escalate price pressures this summer.

news.summary: In Columbus and Cleveland on June 27, 2025, Express Wash Concepts (EWC) revealed that its Clean Express Auto Wash label has been acknowledged as a Cleveland Top Workplace for the second time by The Plain Dealer and cleveland.com. This accolade is given to companies that demonstrate excellence in workplace environments, prioritizing employee satisfaction and well-being.
news.headline: Express Wash Concepts' Clean Express Auto Wash named 2025 Cleveland Top Workplace again by The Plain Dealer & cleveland.com.

news.summary: Participants at the 16th Annual World's Largest Global Event in Overland Park, Kansas, on June 27, 2025, were equipped with essential water safety skills to prevent childhood drowning. Children worldwide were educated on techniques like floating and locating the nearest exit in water-related emergencies. This event focused on empowering communities by providing them with the necessary tools to enhance water safety awareness and prevent accidents. This initiative aims to reduce the alarming statistics of childhood drowning incidents globally.
news.headline: 16th Annual World's Largest Swimming Lesson across 22 countries teaches water safety skills to children globally.

news.summary: A Swedish luxury menswear brand, Eton, is embarking on a new phase of growth with the support of a private investor consortium. This move comes as Eton was acquired by EQT. Under EQT's ownership, Eton focused on enhancing its omnichannel operations, broadening its product range, penetrating new markets, and reinforcing its...
news.headline: Eton, Swedish menswear brand, under new ownership by private investor consortium after development milestones under EQT.

news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, on June 27, 2025, Navamedic has revealed that OraFID® has been granted approval for use with a medicinal product by the Swedish Medical Products Agency, as the Reference Member State, in collaboration with 9 other Concerned Member States across various countries. OraFID® is being hailed as a unique innovation...
news.headline: Navamedic ASA's OraFID® device approved as primary package in 10 countries, including Sweden. Breaking medical product milestone.

news.summary: Chicago-based company Neocol revealed on June 27, 2025, the release of a new Churn Prevention Agent. This innovative tool, utilizing Agentforce and Data Cloud technologies, permits businesses to utilize digital labor for the detection, evaluation, and mitigation of churn risk. By implementing this agent, Customer Success teams can intervene proactively in order to prevent potential customer turnover.
news.headline: Neocol launches Churn Prevention Agent using Agentforce & Data Cloud, aiding enterprises to manage churn risk.

news.summary: At the 2025 Advanced Therapeutics in Movement & Related Disorders Congress in San Diego, it was reported that INGREZZA showed a significant decrease in cognitive and motor-related disease burden compared to the placebo. This highlights the positive impact of INGREZZA on patients, with promising results. These findings emphasize a substantial improvement in patient outcomes, with the data demonstrating a considerable reduction in disease burden associated with both cognitive and motor function. The results of this analysis indicate the potential benefits of utilizing INGREZZA in the treatment of movement and related disorders, offering hope for patients dealing with these conditions.
news.headline: Neurocrine Biosciences shows significant disease burden reduction with INGREZZA for Huntington's Chorea. Presented at ATMRD Congress 2025.

news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina, on June 27, 2025 - The Allspring Income Opportunities Fund (EAD) in the NYSE American, the Allspring Multi-Sector Income Fund (ERC), and the Allspring Utilities and High Income Fund (ERH) have disclosed upcoming distributions. Each fund has revealed a distribution as per the latest news.
news.headline: Allspring's closed-end funds (EAD, ERC, ERH) declared monthly distributions in June 2025. #Investing #Funds #NYSE

news.summary: In Sandusky, Ohio, on June 27, 2025, Civista Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ:CIVB) disclosed plans to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 before the market opens on Thursday, July 24, 2025. The announcement also mentioned that Civista Bancshares, Inc. will conduct a conference call on that same day.
news.headline: Civista Bancshares, Inc. to release Q2 2025 financial results on July 24, 2025. Hosts conference call afterwards.

news.summary: In Greenwich, Connecticut on June 27, 2025, Jan Jedryszek, an engineer, has received a $100,000 O'Shaughnessy Fellowship from O'Shaughnessy Ventures LLC. The fellowship aims to support creators and innovators in their projects. Jedryszek plans to utilize the funds to develop a nanodevice that will establish a connection between biological cells and digital systems.
news.headline: O'Shaughnessy Ventures awards $100K fellowship to Jan Jedryszek to connect living cells to the internet.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, in Orlando, Florida, Northern Jet has officially named Matt Taylor as the new Chief Pilot. This decision highlights the company's dedication to excellence in operations, leading in safety, and maintaining high aviation standards for its expanding fleet.
news.headline: Northern Jet appoints Matt Taylor as Chief Pilot to enhance operational growth and safety. - June 27, 2025.

news.summary: Rosemont, Illinois will be home to EXP, an Entertainment Innovation Hub set to launch in Fall 2025. Renowned Montréal-based immersive arts innovator, PHI Studio, will showcase their Horizon of Khufu and Life Chronicles exhibits at the hub. This launch marks a significant development for the entertainment industry, with the hub set to attract attention from global audiences. The event is scheduled for June 27, 2025, with exposure expected to reach a wide audience as the studio unveils these cutting-edge experiences in a new setting.
news.headline: PHI Studio to showcase 2 immersive experiences at EXP in Fall 2025, Rosemont, IL. Innovating in arts and entertainment.

news.summary: The founders of Across Protocol are facing accusations of manipulating DAO governance in order to direct $23 million worth of tokens to their associated for-profit business, Risk Labs.
news.headline: Allegations of $23M fund misuse surface against Across Protocol DAO founders for diverting tokens to Risk Labs.
